# FINALIZE_GOVERNED_INTENT_TRANSFER_PACKAGE_V1

## Status

Frozen and certified.

This milestone certifies the explicit governed transfer topology:

`Human -> ChatGPT-style conversational reasoning -> explicit governed intent transfer package -> Browser Companion / AiGOL preview -> governance validation -> explicit confirmation -> authorization-gated execution path`

## Certified Included Components

1. governed intent transfer package layer
2. deterministic transfer identity
3. replay identity continuity
4. conversational input preservation
5. normalized governed request preservation
6. downstream runtime target description
7. explicit preview requirement
8. explicit confirmation requirement
9. non-executing transfer semantics
10. ChatGPT non-authority guarantee
11. execution non-authority guarantee
12. Browser Companion transfer export
13. blocked capability guarantees
14. fail-closed transfer validation

## Constitutional Statement

Governed intent transfer packages are non-executing and require explicit governance preview and confirmation.

## Certified Exclusions

- automatic transfer ingestion
- hidden ChatGPT/runtime coupling
- hidden page scraping
- full conversation ingestion
- automatic dispatch
- execution authority
- ChatGPT authority
- Codex execution
- Codex dispatch
- orchestration
- retries/fallbacks
- hidden continuation
- implicit approvals
- autonomous execution
- background synchronization
- broad NLP interpretation
- public runtime exposure

## Closure Statement

The governed intent transfer package epoch is closed. Packages remain explicit,
inert transfer artifacts until a separate governed ingestion milestone is
approved.
